title: archivist: deduplicate persona notes boilerplate into shared guidance 🗃️
summary: Moved duplicated `## Notes` section from all persona READMEs into neutral shared guidance in `.jules/README.md`.
problem_statement: Sixteen different persona READMEs contained identical boilerplate explaining how to use their respective `notes/` directories.

proof_summary.claim: Consolidates persona documentation and reduces repetitive boilerplate.
proof_summary.notes: Verified by diffing the readmes and checking the updated `.jules/README.md`.

rollback: git reset --hard && git clean -fd (excluding needed run data)
